meaning: adj.不相关的adj.不相关的,不切题的
examples: A lot of nit-picking was going on about irrelevant things.
But that's not an irrelevant or inappropriate behavior.
She had no patience for brilliant but irrelevant figures of speech.
Another strange thing about a Viennese coffee house is that the coffee is almost irrelevant.
The interesting question is why your first instinct is to reject these facts as irrelevant.
